com.softsynth.tools.view
Class TextFieldDouble

java.lang.Object
  java.awt.Component
      java.awt.TextComponent
          java.awt.TextField
              com.softsynth.tools.view.TextFieldDouble
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible
public class TextFieldDouble
extends java.awt.TextField

TextField that turns pink when modified, and white when the double value is read from it.

Version:
14.2
Author:
(C) 2000 Phil Burk, SoftSynth.com, All Rights Reserved
See Also:
